6ce8abc75b19c259172e95b728a7404809fe65af.raw: {"dialogue": "listen", "ops": [{"type":"patch","op_id":0,"diff":{"destination":"Portland"}},{"type":"launch","fn":"hold_seat","args":{"train_id":"$RESULT_0.id","seat_class":"first class"}},{"type":"launch","fn":"purchase_ticket","args":{"hold_id":"$RESULT_1.id","passenger":"Alex Chen"}}],"say": "Updating the destination to Portland and holding a first-class seat for Alex Chen."}
